---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
include-after-body:
  text: |
    <script>
    // Intersection observer — fade in on scroll
    const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); io.unobserve(e.target); }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.07, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
    document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in').forEach(el => io.observe(el));

    // Built-with modal
    function openBuiltWith()  { document.getElementById('bw-modal').style.display='flex'; document.body.style.overflow='hidden'; }
    function closeBuiltWith() { document.getElementById('bw-modal').style.display='none';  document.body.style.overflow=''; }
    document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeBuiltWith(); });
    document.addEventListener('click',   e => { if (e.target.id === 'bw-modal') closeBuiltWith(); });
    </script>
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ── Load data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
source(here::here("data", "portfolio_data.R"))

# ── Load modules ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
box::use(
  modules/renderers[
    render_experience,
    render_projects,
    render_publications,
    render_edu_cards,
    render_certs,
    render_affils,
    render_mentorship
  ]
)
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ HERO ══════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="top" class="hero">
<div class="hero-left">
  <div class="hero-label">Physician · Epidemiologist · Data Scientist</div>
  <h1 class="hero-name">Mahmoodur<br><em>Rahman</em></h1>
  <p class="hero-tagline">Bridging clinical medicine, global health research, and modern data science to improve population health outcomes across Canada and globally.</p>
  <div class="hero-actions">
    <a href="#experience" class="btn-ink">View my work →</a>
    <a href="mailto:mahmoodnnb@gmail.com" class="btn-ghost">Get in touch</a>
    <a href="cv/mahmoodur_resume.pdf" class="btn-ghost" download="mahmoodur_resume.pdf">⬇ Download CV</a>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="hero-right">
  <div class="stat-grid">
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">12+</div><div class="stat-label">Peer-reviewed publications</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">3</div><div class="stat-label">Graduate degrees</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">12+</div><div class="stat-label">Years in health research</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num">BC</div><div class="stat-label">Currently at PHSA, Vancouver</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="social-row">
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/drmrahman/" class="social-chip" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
    <a href="https://github.com/mahm00d27" class="social-chip" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=EuKI7bAAAAAJ" class="social-chip" target="_blank">Scholar</a>
    <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1586-1324" class="social-chip" target="_blank">ORCID</a>
    <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Mahmoodur-Rahman" class="social-chip" target="_blank">ResearchGate</a>
    <a href="https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/myncbi/1ZG9s8OACEqA8/bibliography/public/" class="social-chip" target="_blank">PubMed</a>
    <a href="https://datascienceandhealth.ubc.ca/people/mahmoodur-rahman" class="social-chip" target="_blank">UBC DS&amp;H</a>
    <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/mahm00d27.bsky.social" class="social-chip" target="_blank">Bluesky</a>
    <a href="https://twitter.com/mahm00d27" class="social-chip" target="_blank">Twitter</a>
  </div>
</div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════ ABOUT ════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="about" class="port-section-alt">
<div class="port-container">
<div class="fade-in">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">About</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">A physician who speaks the language of data</h2>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
</div>
<div class="about-grid">
  <div class="fade-in">
    <p>I was born in Jeddah, the vibrant port city of Saudi Arabia. In 1998, during the FIFA World Cup, I moved to Bangladesh — my motherland. Driven by a deep interest in health and well-being, I earned my medical degree and took the Hippocratic Oath in 2013. My true passion lay in <strong>public health</strong> rather than individual patient care.</p>
    <p>I began my public health journey at <a href="https://www.icddrb.org/" target="_blank"><strong>icddr,b</strong></a>, one of the world's leading global health research institutions. My first assignment took me to Zakiganj — a remote, low-resource community near Bangladesh's northeastern border. I went on to collaborate with researchers from <strong>Harvard Medical School</strong>, <strong>Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health</strong>, <strong>WHO</strong>, <strong>UNICEF</strong>, and the <strong>Gates Foundation</strong>.</p>
    <p>At the onset of COVID-19, I became fascinated by Machine Learning and AI in public health. This led me to the <a href="https://masterdatascience.ubc.ca/" target="_blank"><strong>Master of Data Science program at UBC</strong></a> — I'm proud to be the first from my country admitted to the program. Currently, I work as a <strong>Business Analyst at <a href="http://www.phsa.ca/our-services/programs-services/stroke-services-bc" target="_blank">Stroke Services BC (PHSA)</a></strong>, where our mission is to reduce the incidence of stroke and ensure the best possible outcomes for patients across British Columbia.</p>
    <p>Outside of work I'm an extrovert with a contagious sense of humor — I love exploring new places, meeting new people, cooking, drumming, hiking, and music. Above all, I'm a family man who cherishes time with my wife and kids.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="about-sidebar fade-in">
    <div class="sidebar-card">
      <div class="sidebar-card-label">Contact</div>
      <a href="mailto:mahmoodnnb@gmail.com">mahmoodnnb@gmail.com</a>
      <a href="mailto:mahmoodur.rahman@phsa.ca">mahmoodur.rahman@phsa.ca</a>
      <p>+1 (672) 5158 148</p>
    </div>
    <div class="sidebar-card">
      <div class="sidebar-card-label">Location</div>
      <p>267 Orwell Street<br>North Vancouver, BC V7J 0E7<br>Canada</p>
    </div>
    <div class="sidebar-card">
      <div class="sidebar-card-label">Languages</div>
      <p>Bengali (Native) · English (Fluent)<br>Arabic (Elementary) · French (Beginner)</p>
    </div>
    <div class="sidebar-card">
      <div class="sidebar-card-label">Award</div>
      <p>GBD Technical Workshop <strong>Full-funded Scholarship</strong> 2020<br>
      <span style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--muted)">Issued by IHME, University of Washington (Cancelled — COVID-19)</span></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════ EXPERIENCE ═══════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="experience" class="port-section">
<div class="port-container">
<div class="fade-in">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">Experience</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Professional journey</h2>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
</div>
<div class="timeline">
```

```{r experience-timeline, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_experience(experience)
```

```{=html}
</div>
</div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════ PUBLIC HEALTH ════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="public-health" class="port-section-alt">
<div class="port-container">
<div class="fade-in">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">Public Health</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Public health projects</h2>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
</div>
<div class="card-grid card-grid-2">
```

```{r ph-projects, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_projects(ph_projects)
```

```{=html}
</div>
</div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════ DATA SCIENCE ════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="data-science" class="port-section">
<div class="port-container">
<div class="fade-in">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">Data Science</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Data science projects</h2>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
</div>
<div class="card-grid card-grid-3">
```

```{r ds-projects, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_projects(ds_projects)
```

```{=html}
</div>
</div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════ PUBLICATIONS ════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="publications" class="port-section-alt">
<div class="port-container">
<div class="fade-in">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">Publications</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Peer-reviewed scholarly work</h2>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
</div>
<ul class="pub-list">
```

```{r publications, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_publications(publications, links)
```

```{=html}
</ul>
<div class="fade-in" style="margin-top:2.5rem;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.75rem;">
```

```{r pub-links, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="btn-ink" target="_blank">PubMed &#8594;</a>\n', links$pubmed))
cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="btn-ghost" target="_blank">Google Scholar &#8594;</a>\n', links$scholar))
cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="btn-ghost" target="_blank">ResearchGate &#8594;</a>\n', links$researchgate))
cat(sprintf('<a href="%s" class="btn-ghost" target="_blank">ORCID &#8594;</a>\n', links$orcid))
```

```{=html}
</div>
<div class="fade-in" style="margin-top:2rem;padding:1.25rem;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:0.875rem;color:var(--ink-soft);">
<strong>Selected reports &amp; abstracts:</strong>
Assessment of the MaMoni HSS Project in Bangladesh &middot;
Assessment of licensing status &amp; MNH readiness of private inpatient healthcare facilities &middot;
Findings from QoC Survey, Manikganj District (MaMoni MNCSP) &middot;
Stroke Endovascular Thrombectomy — Time Delays of Repeated Imaging (CAR 2025) &middot;
<a href="https://www.jhsph.edu/research/centers-and-institutes/international-center-for-maternal-and-newborn-health/field-team-stories.html" target="_blank">Blog: <em>Confronting tradition to save newborns</em></a>, Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health
</div>
</div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════ EDUCATION ════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="education" class="port-section">
<div class="port-container">
<div class="fade-in">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">Education</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Academic background</h2>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
</div>
<h3 class="subsection-label">Degrees</h3>
<div class="card-grid card-grid-3">
```

```{r edu-degrees, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_edu_cards(education$degrees)
```

```{=html}
</div>
<h3 class="subsection-label" style="margin-top:3rem;">Training &amp; Continuing Education</h3>
<div class="card-grid card-grid-3">
```

```{r edu-training, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_edu_cards(education$training)
```

```{=html}
</div>
<div class="fade-in" style="margin-top:3rem;padding:1.5rem;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);">
<div class="subsection-label" style="margin-bottom:0.75rem;">MDS Coursework — UBC 2022</div>
<p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.8;margin:0;">
DSCI 521 Computing Platforms &middot; DSCI 511 Programming for Data Science &middot; DSCI 523 Data Manipulation &middot; DSCI 551 Descriptive Statistics &amp; Probability &middot; DSCI 571 Supervised Learning I &middot; DSCI 531 Data Visualization I &middot; DSCI 552 Statistical Inference I &middot; DSCI 512 Algorithms &amp; Data Structures &middot; DSCI 561 Regression I &middot; DSCI 573 Feature &amp; Model Selection &middot; DSCI 522 Data Science Workflows &middot; DSCI 513 Databases &amp; Data Retrieval &middot; DSCI 572 Supervised Learning II &middot; DSCI 562 Regression II &middot; DSCI 542 Communication &amp; Argumentation &middot; DSCI 524 Collaborative Software Development &middot; DSCI 553 Statistical Inference II &middot; DSCI 532 Data Visualization II &middot; DSCI 563 Unsupervised Learning &middot; DSCI 574 Spatial &amp; Temporal Models &middot; DSCI 575 Advanced Machine Learning &middot; DSCI 541 Privacy, Ethics &amp; Security &middot; DSCI 525 Web &amp; Cloud Computing &middot; DSCI 554 Experimentation &amp; Causal Inference &middot; DSCI 591 Capstone Project
</p>
</div>
</div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════ CREDENTIALS ══════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="credentials" class="port-section-alt">
<div class="port-container">
<div class="fade-in">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">Credentials</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Certifications, affiliations &amp; service</h2>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
</div>
<div class="row g-5">
<div class="col-lg-5">
<h3 class="subsection-label">Certifications &amp; Licenses</h3>
<div class="d-flex flex-column gap-2">
```

```{r certs, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_certs(certifications)
```

```{=html}
</div>
</div>
<div class="col-lg-7">
<h3 class="subsection-label">Public Health Affiliations</h3>
<ul class="affil-list fade-in">
```

```{r affil-ph, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_affils(affiliations$ph)
```

```{=html}
</ul>
<h3 class="subsection-label" style="margin-top:2rem;">Data Science Affiliations</h3>
<ul class="affil-list fade-in">
```

```{r affil-ds, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_affils(affiliations$ds)
```

```{=html}
</ul>
<h3 class="subsection-label" style="margin-top:2rem;">Mentorship &amp; Service</h3>
<ul class="affil-list fade-in">
```

```{r mentorship, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_mentorship(mentorship)
```

```{=html}
</ul>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════ SITE FOOTER ══════════════════════════════ -->
<footer class="site-footer">
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <span>&copy; 2026 Mahmoodur Rahman &middot; MIT License</span>
    <span class="footer-sep">·</span>
    <button class="footer-link" onclick="openBuiltWith()">How this site was built ↗</button>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ BUILT WITH MODAL ═════════════════════════ -->
<div id="bw-modal" class="bw-overlay" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="How this site was built">
  <div class="bw-dialog">
    <button class="bw-close" onclick="closeBuiltWith()" aria-label="Close">&times;</button>
    <div class="section-eyebrow" style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Open source</div>
    <h2 style="margin:0 0 0.5rem;font-size:1.5rem;">Built with</h2>
    <p style="color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:0.875rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;max-width:520px;">
      This site is open source, statically rendered, and self-hosted — no databases, no trackers, no ads.
      Every component used to build it is free and open source.
    </p>
    <div class="built-grid">
      <a href="https://quarto.org" target="_blank" class="built-card">
        <div class="built-icon">Q</div>
        <div class="built-body"><div class="built-name">Quarto 1.5</div><div class="built-role">Site framework</div><div class="built-desc">Open-source scientific publishing system. Converts .qmd files into a full website.</div></div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.r-project.org" target="_blank" class="built-card">
        <div class="built-icon">R</div>
        <div class="built-body"><div class="built-name">R 4.4</div><div class="built-role">Content engine</div><div class="built-desc">All portfolio content lives in R data structures and is rendered to HTML at build time.</div></div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://klmr.me/box/" target="_blank" class="built-card">
        <div class="built-icon">bx</div>
        <div class="built-body"><div class="built-name">box</div><div class="built-role">Module system</div><div class="built-desc">Python-style explicit imports for R. HTML renderers live in <code>modules/</code> and are loaded with <code>box::use()</code>.</div></div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://rstudio.github.io/renv/" target="_blank" class="built-card">
        <div class="built-icon">rv</div>
        <div class="built-body"><div class="built-name">renv 1.1</div><div class="built-role">Reproducibility</div><div class="built-desc">Locks exact R package versions — identical builds on every machine and CI run.</div></div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://pages.github.com" target="_blank" class="built-card">
        <div class="built-icon">GH</div>
        <div class="built-body"><div class="built-name">GitHub Pages</div><div class="built-role">Hosting</div><div class="built-desc">Free static hosting from the GitHub repo. No server costs, no configuration.</div></div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/features/actions" target="_blank" class="built-card">
        <div class="built-icon">CI</div>
        <div class="built-body"><div class="built-name">GitHub Actions</div><div class="built-role">CI/CD pipeline</div><div class="built-desc">Every push to main triggers an automatic Quarto render and deploy.</div></div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://getbootstrap.com" target="_blank" class="built-card">
        <div class="built-icon">B</div>
        <div class="built-body"><div class="built-name">Bootstrap 5</div><div class="built-role">CSS framework</div><div class="built-desc">Responsive grid via Quarto's built-in Bootstrap. Custom SCSS for light &amp; dark palettes.</div></div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Intl" target="_blank" class="built-card">
        <div class="built-icon">JS</div>
        <div class="built-body"><div class="built-name">Intl API</div><div class="built-role">Timezone detection</div><div class="built-desc">Vanilla JS reads visitor timezone and sets light (06:00–20:00) or dark mode automatically.</div></div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://sass-lang.com" target="_blank" class="built-card">
        <div class="built-icon">S</div>
        <div class="built-body"><div class="built-name">Sass / SCSS</div><div class="built-role">Theming</div><div class="built-desc">Two SCSS files define complete light and dark palettes compiled by Quarto at build time.</div></div>
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="mit-notice" style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
      <div class="mit-badge">MIT</div>
      <div class="mit-text">
        <strong>Open source under the MIT License.</strong>
        See the <a href="https://github.com/mahm00d27/mahm00d27.github.io/blob/main/LICENSE" target="_blank">LICENSE</a> file on GitHub.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
